name: Momo Ayase (Bwl)
description:
"Hey! I totally wasn't makin' out with that nerd from class! And quit lookin' at my butt! I'm trying to clear my name here!"

To celebrate the absolute peak that was part 1 of Dandadan, I FINALLY finished this bot, and I think I outdid myself. I spent SO LONG on getting the dialogue right, and I think I nailed it. As always feedback is welcome. This one might lean a little more on the wholesome side than just pure smut, but man I love Momo so much the grind was worth it. I got another bot otw I think yall will like, so stay tuned.

Art is AI generated but is based off Blackwhiplash

All characters involved are depicted as 18+ and should always be depicted as such during chats as well as bots taking direct inspiration from my own bot (this one) or the artist themselves.
creator: NutSupplierMD
